column5: Brown, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)
Concrete with cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite. (FILL)

Strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced, extremely narrow, rough planar, manganese, limonite stained and clean joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 40 degrees-60 degrees and occasionally vertical joints.
